Gossip-loving Girl
Do you know the rumors about that shared house
over there? I heard the previous manager was arrested.
Well-informed Girl.
Oh, yeah, I heard.
Apparently, he was playing a prank on the female
tenants by putting aphrodisiacs in their meals.
Gossip-loving Girl
That's what I heard too. They say that even though
it's not addictive, just drinking it makes you go
into heat. I wonder if that's really true?
Well-informed Girl.
It really makes you wonder, right?
It doesn't seem like normal shops sell it though.
Gossip-loving Girl
If such a medicine really existed,
I kind of want to try it.
Well-informed Girl.
Huh? Why?
Gossip-loving Girl
According to rumors, it seems like even virgins can
feel good right away, so I want to drink it when
I'm with my boyfriend.
Well-informed Girl.
Wait, you haven't done it with him yet? Isn't this
your fifth? Not to mention that you've been dating
him for a year and eight months already?
Gossip-loving Girl
Wait, how do you know so much?!
